fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field in the Item Tracking Lines window.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field in the Item Tracking Lines window.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field in the Item Tracking Lines window.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field with the same name in the Item Tracking Lines window.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field in the Item Tracking Lines window.

fields.name: Warranty Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field in the Item Tracking Lines window.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field in the Item Tracking Lines window.

fields.name: Qty. to Handle (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field in the Item Tracking Lines window.

fields.name: Quantity Handled (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field in the Item Tracking Lines window.

fields.name: New Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a new serial number that replaces the number in the Serial No. field, when you post the warehouse item reclassification journal.

fields.name: New Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a new lot number that replaces the number in the Lot No. field, when you post the warehouse item reclassification journal.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field in the Item Tracking Lines window.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: New Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same as the field in the Item Tracking Lines window.

fields.name: Package No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a new package number that replaces the package number, when you post the warehouse item reclassification journal.

fields.name: New Package No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a new package number that replaces the number in the Package No. field, when you post the warehouse item reclassification journal.
